# Medicare Moms

> Medicare Moms is a licensed insurance agency helping families find the right Medicare, Medigap, ACA Marketplace, and supplemental insurance coverage. Licensed in 40+ states and Puerto Rico. Agents speak English, Spanish, Japanese, and German. A Wildcat Insurance company.

Medicare Moms is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to the federal Medicare program, CMS, or any government agency. Services are free to consumers; agents are paid by the insurance carriers when a plan is enrolled.

## About

- [Homepage](https://medicaremoms.com/): Overview of services and agent support
- [Meet Our Team](https://medicaremoms.com/meet-our-team/): Licensed agents with contact info and languages spoken
- [Join Our Team](https://medicaremoms.com/join-our-team/): Careers for licensed insurance agents, including flexible and salaried paths

## Coverage Types We Offer

- [All Services](https://medicaremoms.com/services/): Full list of insurance products
- [Medicare Advantage](https://medicaremoms.com/services/#medicare-advantage): Part C plans
- [Medicare Supplements (Medigap)](https://medicaremoms.com/services/#medigap): Gap-filling plans for Original Medicare
- [ACA / Marketplace](https://medicaremoms.com/services/#aca): Individual and family health plans for people under 65
- [Dental, Vision & Supplemental](https://medicaremoms.com/services/#dental-vision): Ancillary coverage
- [Life Insurance & Long-Term Care](https://medicaremoms.com/services/#life-insurance): Term, final expense, and LTC

## Educational Resources

- [Medicare Resources Hub](https://medicaremoms.com/resources/): Consumer guidance on Medicare
- [ACA & Individual Insurance Resources](https://medicaremoms.com/aca-resources/): Marketplace guidance
- [How to Enroll in Medicare](https://medicaremoms.com/enroll-medicare/): IEP, SEP, AEP, OEP, GEP, IRMAA guide
- [2026 ACA Cheat Sheet](https://medicaremoms.com/resources/aca-cheat-sheet-2026/): Full reference — FPL, subsidies, Medicaid/CHIP, MOOP, employer affordability, APTC repayment
- [2026 ACA Quick Reference (1-page)](https://medicaremoms.com/resources/aca-quickref-2026/): Printable agent/consumer cheat sheet

## Blog & Statistics

- [Blog](https://medicaremoms.com/blog/): Ongoing Medicare and insurance content
- [Medicare by the Numbers 2026](https://medicaremoms.com/blog/medicare-statistics-2026/): Enrollment, costs, IRA changes, OBBBA impact; sourced from CMS, KFF, CBO
- [2026 ACA Marketplace by the Numbers](https://medicaremoms.com/blog/aca-marketplace-2026/): Enrollment trends, enhanced subsidy expiration, OBBBA provisions, 2025 FPL chart
- [Understanding Medicare in 2026](https://medicaremoms.com/blog/medicare-guide-2026/): Full guide to Parts A, B, C, D for new enrollees

## Contact

- Phone: (435) 246-1548
- Email: info@medicaremoms.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm Mountain Time
- [Free consultation form](https://medicaremoms.com/#contact)
- [Needs Analysis intake](https://medicaremoms.com/needs-analysis/): Detailed intake form for personalized plan recommendations

## Legal & Compliance

- [Privacy Policy](https://medicaremoms.com/privacy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://medicaremoms.com/terms/)
- [Consent & TPMO Disclosure](https://medicaremoms.com/consent-disclosure/): Full TCPA contact consent and CMS Third-Party Marketing Organization disclosure

## TPMO Disclosure

We do not offer every plan available in your area. Any information we provide is limited to those plans we do offer in your area. Please contact Medicare.gov or 1-800-MEDICARE to get information on all of your options.
